productName: SusPENded Signature Resin Disposable, Maui Wowie - 1g
description: This sativa disposable carries Maui Wowie in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of tropical, pineapple, and citrus, with an active, daytime spark.
